data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Distributes incoming network traffic across multiple servers to ensure no single server is overwhelmed.
data.technical_spec: Uses hardware or software solutions to manage request flow in real-time.

data.title: Scalable Microservices
data.description: Architecture style that structures the application as a collection of small autonomous services.
data.technical_spec: Individual services that are loosely coupled and can be developed, deployed, and scaled independently.

data.title: API Gateway
data.description: Acts as a single entry point for all client interactions, routing them to the appropriate services.
data.technical_spec: Manages authentication, routing, rate limiting, and more for APIs.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Geographically distributed network of proxy servers that cache content close to end-users.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes edge servers to store copies of content to reduce latency.

data.title: High Availability Clustering
data.description: Ensures application availability even in the case of server failure.
data.technical_spec: Uses clusters of servers to provide failover support.
